results.testName: First-contact message from unknown sender lands in inbox
results.evidence: Send returned 201 with first_contact=true. Message "msg_c009881e-7240-4a93-8422-7638ac4c5e79" found in Bob's inbox with state=delivered.

results.testName: Multiple unknown senders all deliver to same recipient inbox
results.evidence: Both Alice and Charlie (unknown senders) successfully delivered to Bob's inbox. Total inbox count: 2.

results.testName: Read and ack work on first-contact messages
results.evidence: Read returned 200, ack returned 200 with state=acked for first-contact message msg_e9373515-b6cd-428d-b3e0-11fbb935821b.

results.testName: Unknown sender contact status shows pending with autonomy_allowed=false
results.evidence: Contact status API returned status=pending, autonomy_allowed=false for unknown sender.
Approve API returned 200. Status changed from pending→approved with autonomy_allowed=true. Second check confirms approval is remembered.

results.testName: Message from approved contact has first_contact=false, autonomy_allowed=true
results.evidence: Message from approved Alice: first_contact=false, autonomy_allowed=true. Delivery succeeded (201).

results.testName: Unapproved contact: delivery succeeds but autonomy_allowed=false
results.evidence: Message from unapproved Charlie: first_contact=true, autonomy_allowed=false. Delivery still succeeded (201). Policy gates autonomy only, not delivery.

results.testName: First-contact sender creates pending contact record on delivery
results.evidence: Pending contacts: ["acct_charlie_val"]. Charlie (unapproved) is pending, Alice (approved) is not.

results.testName: No autonomous actions on messages from pending contacts (state=delivered)
results.evidence: Message msg_80ddf158-ccdb-41b3-84a5-19b8559872f9 from unknown sender: state=delivered, read_at=null, acked_at=null. No autonomous actions occurred.

results.testName: Read/ack does not auto-approve pending contact
results.evidence: After Bob read+acked Charlie's message, Charlie's contact status remains pending with autonomy_allowed=false. No auto-approve on read/ack.

results.testName: Approving pending contact enables future autonomy
results.evidence: Charlie approved: subsequent message has first_contact=false, autonomy_allowed=true. Charlie removed from pending contacts list.
